input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.3.4
            TITLE: late or non submission will prevent use of etc, see dr.3.4.1

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.3.4: Late or non submission will prevent use of ETC, see DR.3.4.1
IC.4.3.4 Late or non submission will prevent use of ETC, see DR.3.4.1

final_answer: Late or non submission will prevent use of ETC, see DR.3.4.1
